commits: c5f3cb1: fix(security): prevent symlink traversal in file APIs
message: TDD implementation complete. Added resolveAndValidateRealPath() to path-validator.ts with symlink traversal prevention via realpathSync. Integrated into all 5 file operation functions, validateFileOperation(), and 3 API route endpoints. 19 new test cases (10 in path-validator.test.ts, 9 in file-operations-symlink.test.ts). All 4324 unit tests pass. ESLint and TypeScript checks clean.
